name: Robin iParFect 150 FW RGBW
comment: The all-new iParFect 150 FW RGBW is loaded with killer features. It has an exceptionally-wide zoom range, is completely silent with passive cooling and with an IP 65 rating, is ideal for television, theatres, concert halls and any kind of outdoor events.

capabilities.comment: Save present DMX values to the fixture as initial DMX values
PWM output frequency of LEDs: Standard (300Hz)
PWM output frequency of LEDs: High
Filter 281 (Three Quarter CT Blue) (Three Quarter CT Blue)
Filter 285 (Three Quarter CT Orange) (Three Quarter CT Orange)
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour Mix)
Crossfade (crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix)

gwSpecs.description: The all-new iParFect 150 FW RGBW is loaded with killer features. It has an exceptionally-wide zoom range, is completely silent with passive cooling and with an IP 65 rating, is ideal for television, theatres, concert halls and any kind of outdoor events.
